title: conyza saltensis
intro: Conyza saltensis, also known as Saltbrush Fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Conyza saltensis include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Conyza saltensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems.
